mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID FROM FWK_WORK_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID LIKE #{userId} || '%' AND LENGTH(#{userId}) + 3 = LENGTH(GROUP_ID) ORDER BY GROUP_ID ASC
SELECT GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID FROM FWK_WORK_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID FROM FWK_WORK_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID LIKE #{userId} || '%' AND LENGTH(#{userId}) + 3 = LENGTH(GROUP_ID) ORDER BY GROUP_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_WORK_GROUP (GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, GROUP_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) VALUES ( (SELECT #{userId} || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(GROUP_ID, LENGTH(#{userId}) + 1))), 0) + 1, 3, '0') FROM FWK_WORK_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID LIKE #{userId} || '%' AND LENGTH(#{userId}) + 3 = LENGTH(GROUP_ID)), #{groupName}, #{groupDesc}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_WORK_GROUP SET GROUP_NAME = #{groupName}, GROUP_DESC = #{groupDesc}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
